full_text:
Qing Niujue [Green Oxhorn] 青牛角
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qing Niujue [Green Oxhorn] (青牛角). One of the bandits defeated by Yuan Shao. Qing Niujue [Green Oxhorn] was a bandit Qing Niujue [Green Oxhorn] lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
